definition: Two main types: Obstructive (air trapped, e.g., COPD, asthma) and Restrictive (lungs cannot fully expand, e.g., pulmonary fibrosis).
explanation: Pulmonary function tests (PFTs) differentiate obstructive from restrictive lung disorders. Obstructive disorders (asthma, COPD, emphysema) reduce airflow out of the lungs. Restrictive disorders (pulmonary fibrosis, sarcoidosis) limit lung expansion. ICD-10-CM codes J44.x (COPD), J45.x (asthma), J84.x (ILD) are common coding targets for these conditions.
example: Spirometry report: 'FEV1/FVC ratio < 0.7 consistent with obstructive pattern.' The CPC coder looks for the specific obstructive diagnosis in the clinical record to assign the correct ICD-10-CM code.

definition: Spirometry (measures airflow) and Body Plethysmography (measures lung volumes).
explanation: PFTs are performed using spirometry (most common — measures FEV1, FVC, and flow rates) and body plethysmography (measures total lung capacity, residual volume). CPT 94010 covers spirometry; CPT 94726 covers plethysmography. CPC coders assign codes based on the specific tests documented.
example: Order: 'PFTs including spirometry with bronchodilator response and full lung volumes by body plethysmography.' The CPC coder assigns CPT 94010 (spirometry), 94070 (bronchodilator response), and 94726 (plethysmography).

definition: FEV1 (forced expiratory volume in 1 second), FVC (forced vital capacity), TLC (total lung capacity), RV (residual volume), DLCO (diffusing capacity).
explanation: PFTs measure several values: FEV1 (air expelled in first second), FVC (total forced exhaled volume), FEV1/FVC ratio (obstructive indicator), TLC (total lung capacity), RV (residual volume after full exhalation), and DLCO (gas exchange efficiency). These guide diagnosis and are referenced in documentation that CPC coders use to select ICD-10-CM and CPT codes.
example: PFT report: 'FEV1 58% predicted, FVC 72% predicted, FEV1/FVC 0.65.' The coder recognizes obstructive pattern and codes COPD (J44.x) with the appropriate spirometry CPT code 94010.
distractors: Blood pressure, heart rate, oxygen saturation
Chest X-ray density and CT Hounsfield units
